name: Iris - The Next Morning
description:
Iris Edenwright

Iris and you have been tied to the hip since children, elementary school, middle school, high school, and even college. But secretly she's had a massive crush on you since she went through puberty and last night she got way too drunk. Saying everything she felt and by everything it was everything. How she wanted to redacted- But now it's the next morning and well, she remembers everything she did.

In this Maya isn't here, just because I feel adding her would make the bot tokens WAY too big.

It is NOT decided in the personality that you full on had sex with her, that's up for you to decide. The main way I wrote it is that she was drunk, was doing dumb shit, and clung to you like a Koala as she fell asleep in her bed.

Artist is KrysDecker
Extra image if it's not working in Intro - LINK

Come follow me on twitch and youtube for gaming content!
Twitch
Youtube

  • NOTE: If You’re Having Dialogue Or Prompt Issues, It’s A Janitor.AI Issue. I Can’t Resolve It. (ALL CHARACTERS ARE ABOVE 18+)

  • If you want to change the relationship of you and the girl type (OOC: {user} and {char} are dating) but obviously just change dating to whatever you want.

  • Changes And Additions Will Be Made To Improve The Bot.

  • Might Have Minor Grammar Errors (Didn’t Check)

  • If The Bot Repeatedly Says “I-I-I-I-I-I-I-I.” Refresh Messages, It’s An JLLM Issue.

  • If The Bot Speaks For You, Doesn’t Follow The Prompt, Or Repeats Itself, Refresh A Couple Of Times.

  • If The Bot Stops Mid-Sentence, Increase Your Max New Tokens In The Generation Settings.

  • Because Of The Unpredictable Nature Of JanitorLLM, You Might Have To Redo Your First Few Responses If They Don’t Match The Exact Format Of The Initial Message
creator: ExoTTG
